TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Abdelmadjid_Tebboune, title = Abdelmadjid_Tebboune, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdelmadjid_Tebboune} }

S.FORM: Abdelmadjid Tebboune ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Abdelmadjid Tebboune, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Algeria ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelmadjid Tebboune, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Abdelmadjid Tebboune ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Abdelmadjid Tebboune, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Algeria ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelmadjid Tebboune, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: aβ*elma*ji* teββoune rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, aβ*elma*ji* teββoune, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw alɣeria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*elma*ji* teββoune, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
